zh: 兩到三歲的孩童不容易懂這麼複雜的指令、
en: Two- to three-year-olds struggle with complex instructions,

zh: 所以當父母的必須在毎一個時刻裡、
只教一種容易控制的步驟、
en: should teach just one manageable step at a time.

zh: 從開始訓練到孩子完成訓練之間、
en: From the start of training until completion,

zh: 你一定要避免動怒、斥責或體罰、
en: you absolutely must avoid anger, scolding, or physical punishment.

zh: 家長要重複地讓孩子練習不同的大小便動作、
en: Have your child repeatedly practice the different toileting steps,

zh: 直到孩子完全學會為止。
記住、要不停的誇他、鼓勵他、耐心的訓練他、
en: Remember — keep praising, encouraging, training patiently,

zh: 家長就會微笑著驗收成果了。
en: parents will be smiling at the results.
